BaseTemplate.description: Starter code for your Nextjs Boilerplate with Tailwind CSS

TTMSConnectHomePage.hero_subheadline: Join thousands of fleet organisation who use TTMSConnect to analyze, automate, and scale their fleet effectively—all in one place.
TTMSConnectHomePage.features_subheading: Powerful features designed to help you manage, optimize, and grow your marketing efforts without the complexity.
TTMSConnectHomePage.process_heading: Streamline your workflow in three simple steps.
TTMSConnectHomePage.process_subheading: Stop switching between tabs. TTMSConnect brings your entire marketing stack together so you can focus on strategy.
TTMSConnectHomePage.testimonials_subheading: See what our customers have to say about TTMSConnect.
TTMSConnectHomePage.pricing_subheading: Choose the plan that fits your needs. No hidden fees.
TTMSConnectHomePage.faq_subheading: Everything you need to know about the product and billing. Can't find the answer you're looking for? Please chat to our friendly team.
TTMSConnectHomePage.cta_subheading: Join 10,000+ fleet organisation today. Start your 14-day free trial and see the difference.
TTMSConnectHomePage.cta_disclaimer: No credit card required. Cancel anytime.
TTMSConnectHomePage.footer_tagline: Empowering fleet organisation with data-driven insights and automation tools to scale growth effectively.

Index.meta_description: Next js Boilerplate is the perfect starter code for your project. Build your React application with the Next.js framework.

About.about_paragraph: Welcome to our About page! We are a team of passionate individuals dedicated to creating amazing software.

Portfolio.presentation: Welcome to my portfolio page! Here you will find a carefully curated collection of my work and accomplishments. Through this portfolio, I'm to showcase my expertise, creativity, and the value I can bring to your projects.

PortfolioSlug.content: Created a set of promotional materials and branding elements for a corporate event. Crafted a visually unified theme, encompassing a logo, posters, banners, and digital assets. Integrated the client's brand identity while infusing it with a contemporary and innovative approach.

SignIn.meta_description: Seamlessly sign in to your account with our user-friendly login process.

SignUp.meta_description: Effortlessly create an account through our intuitive sign-up process.

Dashboard.alternative_message: Need advanced features? Multi-tenancy & Teams, Roles & Permissions, Shadcn UI, End-to-End Typesafety with oRPC, Stripe Payment, Light / Dark mode. Try <url></url>.
Dashboard.max_message: Or, need a Self-hosted auth stack (Better Auth)? Try <url></url>.
